'''House Sreethyn''' was one of the more militant of the noble [[Ancient Houses]] that ruled [[Juvex sector/Legends|Juvex sector]].<ref name="Children of the Jedi">[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']]</ref> Their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was [[Juvex]], which was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] solely in name; only outsiders were concerned with the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] official title. House Sreethyn also possessed a trio of shabby industrial worlds, [[Kimm Aurek]], [[Kimm Besh|Besh]], and [[Kimm Cresh|Cresh]].<ref name="Atlas" /> In [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] the House allied with [[Roganda Ismaren/Legends|Roganda Ismaren]].<ref name="Children of the Jedi" />
